title: Gerascanthus fragrantissimus

It is further grouped within the subfamily Rauvolfioideae, which includes several genera of flowering plants. The genus Gerascanthus itself is part of the tribe Plumeriae, a group of flowering plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Gerascanthus fragrantissimus is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of botany.
